name: Vogiatzoglou Systems S.A.
summary: Vogiatzoglou Systems S.A. provides products and solutions for store and warehouse furnishing in Greece. The company offers warehouse shelves and equipment, including pallet racks, drive in products, push backs, radio shuttles, live storage products, cantilevers, mezzanines, mezzanine and light duty shelves, and mobile archives; retail store equipment, such as super market carts and baskets, merchandise transportation carts and cages, airport carts, and customer guidance systems, as well as super market cash desks and service counters; and signage and promotion products. It also provides store equipment and furnishing products for super and mini markets, liquor and bakery, book, cosmetics, fashion, sports, home accessory, optics, toys, pet shop, electrical and electronics, DIY, and garden equipment stores. In addition, the company offers solutions for pharmacy equipment, furnishing, renovation, and design. Further, it trades in and distributes technical and DIY products. Vogiatzoglou Systems S.A. was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Metamorfosi, Greece.
